title: Expand autotune coverage for linear-cross-entropy kernels
summary: Broadened Triton autotune coverage for CE forward and backward kernels.
success_gate: Expand the config surface without regressing correctness, then measure it with a dedicated CE benchmark.

results.note: Expanded autotune configs for forward mainloop (1->8), backward kernels (1->6 each), and epilogue kernels (1->6 each). Configs cover small, medium, and large token-vocab combinations.
